text.title: Market Research: TAM/SAM/SOM Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the Market Research: TAM/SAM/SOM methodology end-to-end. Each step lists input, action, output, and an optional decision gate.

step.name: top-down-pull
step.action: Search 2-3 industry reports; scale to chosen geography; cite URL + retrieval date.

step.name: bottom-up-build
step.action: Multiply price x reachable units within ICP + geo.

step.name: triangulate
step.action: Compute delta_pct; if >30%, write reconciliation paragraph.
step.decision-gate: If delta>30%, write reconciliation; do not average.

step.name: derive-sam-som
step.action: SAM = TAM * share-of-product-fit; SOM = SAM * share-of-channel-reach + first-year-conversion.
